title: Give Us Concrete Slabs! (G.U.C.S.)
description: Simply adds Concrete block variants (Stairs, Slabs, Walls), and that's it, no extra fluff.
body:
## Description
Other mods that add concrete block variants either have too much fluff, or arent up to date.
This mod was made to do one thing, and one thing only. It adds Concrete Stairs, Slabs, and Walls. And that's it.
![GUCS Blocks](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/Zu799iWX/images/b2578ca32689b039dd4669ececf33f1ffce80887.png)
## FAQ
**Q: How does texture pack support work?**
> A: GUCS pulls directly from the vanilla concrete textures, so any texture pack that changes concrete will also change the additional blocks.

**Q: Version Support? Ports to 1.X.X?**
> A: My goal is to support every version that I can from 1.21.4 onward. Though it may take a while if Mojang decides to change a lot on the backend.
>
> As for backports, we will see.

**Q: Other modloaders? Neoforge?**
> A: While Neoforge is not officially supported, [Sinytra Connector](https://modrinth.com/mod/connector) should work since GUCS is a fairly simple mod.

**Q: HELP! I've Encountered a bug! / Something doesn't work!**
> A: If you encounter any issues at all, please don't be afraid to join [the discord](https://discord.com/invite/VdtQBPY) and submit a bug report.
